title: Light Garlic Bean Stir-fry
description: A refreshing Thai-inspired dish featuring haricot beans in a light garlic sauce, perfect for a quick and healthy dinner.

ingredients.name: Pinch of sugar (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a touch of sweetness to balance flavors

instructions: Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the haricot beans to the wok, tossing them around for even cooking. Cook for about 5 minutes.
Drizzle in the soy sauce and rice vinegar, stirring well to combine with the beans.
If desired, add a pinch of sugar to balance flavors.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
